scripts.smoke: node -e "const u='https://dilab.sean111400.workers.dev';const paths=['/','/dashboard','/ask','/topics','/products/anua-heartleaf-77'];const sleep=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));(async()=>{let allOk=true;for(const p of paths){let ok=false;for(let i=0;i<20;i++){try{const r=await fetch(u+p);if(r.status===200){ok=true;break}}catch{}await sleep(3000)}if(!ok)allOk=false;process.stdout.write(ok?'.':'!')}console.log(allOk?' smoke ok':' smoke FAILED — cold-start 미해소');process.exit(allOk?0:1)})()"
scripts.deploy: npm run clean && opennextjs-cloudflare build && wrangler deploy && npm run smoke
